assignments.description: getting the recordtypeid for MIR handover

assignments.label: Assgin MIR Handover RecordtypeID

decisions.name: Contact_has_Department_Seniority_and_Title
decisions.label: Contact has Department, Seniority and Title?

rules.name: Yes_Contact_has_Department_Seniority_and_Title
rules.label: Yes, Contact has Department, Seniority and Title

decisions.name: Contact_us_Task_related_to_Lead_or_Account
decisions.label: Contact us Task related to Lead or Account
decisions.defaultConnectorLabel: Account, switch to regular MIR Handover

decisions.name: Convert_to_New_or_Existing_Account
decisions.label: Convert to New or Existing Account

decisions.name: Rule_MCC_Meeting_was_Created_from_CU_Task
decisions.label: *Rule (MCC)* - Meeting was Created from CU Task?

Flow.description: MIS-8039 Cross solution's product tracking - Meetings MIS-7592 - Updated Strategic Region visibility conditions MIS-7609 - remove product sold MIS-7592 - Added missing Contact Department, Seniority and Title validation MIS-6963 - Process Update MIS-5332 - Meeting source filter MIS-4859 - CU Updates MIS-4770 15-2-24: support CU Task, Lead conversion MIS-4833 21-1-24: support on Task object Primary and Secondary Use Case instead of Solution
Flow.label: MIR Handover

fields.name: BlankCountry
fields.fieldText: Account country is blank. Please go back to Account and update the country fields.

fields.name: BlankCountry_0
fields.fieldText:
Contact country is blank. Please update the country fields on contact.

{!ContactLink}

fields.name: Contacts_Not_AccurateText
fields.fieldText:
If any details in the contacts are inaccurate please exit this wizard and manually update the contacts.
For any further assistance please contact SalesOps.

fields.name: Conversion_Error_Text
fields.fieldText: There was an error in the process, please try again or contact Marketing Ops

fields.name: Text_Existing_Account_select
fields.fieldText:
Keep Blank to create new account

OR

Select an existing Account

fields.name: First_Screen_AccountHeader1
fields.fieldText:
Company Details
Please verify the company/Account details.

fields.name: First_Screen_AccountName
fields.fieldText: Account/Company Name: {!VarAccountName}

fields.name: First_Screen_AccountBU
fields.fieldText: Business Unit: {!VarBusinessUnit}

fields.name: Info
fields.fieldText:
Please note:

1) If you want to keep the current values, select them again.

2) If you want to keep the current values and add new ones, select the current values and the new ones together.

3) If you do not select any values, the picklists will be blank.

fields.name: CurrentAgencySubCategory
fields.fieldText:
{!CurrentAgencySubCategoryLabel}

{!varAgencySubCategoryToDisplay}

fields.name: First_Screen_AccountWebsite
fields.fieldText: Website: {!VarWebsite}

fields.name: First_Screen_AccountSWIndustry
fields.fieldText: SW Industry: {!VarSWIndustry}

fields.name: First_Screen_AccountAddress
fields.fieldText:
Address: {!VatStreet}
{!VarCity}
{!VarState}
{!VarPostalCode}
{!VarCountry}

fields.name: First_Screen_AccountMinEmployee
fields.fieldText: Min # of Employees: {!VarEmployeeMin}

fields.name: First_Screen_AccountAnnualRev
fields.fieldText: Min Annual Revenue: {!VarAnnualRevenueMin}

fields.name: First_Screen_AccountAccurate
fields.fieldText: Account details accurate?

fields.name: Contacts_ScreenHeader
fields.fieldText:
Contact Details

Please verify contact details.

fields.name: Contacts_ScreenAccurate1
fields.fieldText: Contact details accurate?

fields.name: First_Screen_AccountHeader1_0
fields.fieldText:
Company Details
Please verify the company/Account details.

fields.name: First_Screen_AccountName_0
fields.fieldText: Account/Company Name: {!VarAccountName}

fields.name: First_Screen_AccountBU_0
fields.fieldText: Business Unit: {!VarBusinessUnit}

fields.name: Info1
fields.fieldText:
Please note:

1) If you want to keep the current values, select them again.

2) If you want to keep the current values and add new ones, select the current values and the new ones together.

3) If you do not select any values, the picklists will be blank.

fields.fieldText: Website: {!VarWebsite}

fields.name: First_Screen_AccountSWIndustry_0
fields.fieldText: SW Industry: {!VarSWIndustry}

fields.name: First_Screen_AccountAccurate_0
fields.fieldText: Account details accurate?

fields.name: Meeting_Source_validation_text
fields.fieldText: Looks like you forgot to update the Meeting Source:

fields.name: MissinContactDetailsText
fields.fieldText:
Contact Details

Please fill in missing details.

fields.name: QuestionaireScreenHeader
fields.fieldText: Handover Questionaire:

value.stringValue: LinkedIn Profile (please use https://www.didnotfind.com if no LinkedIn found)
Company LinkedIn link (please use https://www.didnotfind.com if no LinkedIn found)

fields.name: Second_Screen_LeadHeader1
fields.fieldText:
Lead Details
Please verify the Lead details.

fields.name: Second_Screen_LeadName
fields.fieldText: Lead Name: {!VarLeadName}

fields.name: Second_Screen_LeadTitle
fields.fieldText: Title: {!VarLeadTitle}

fields.name: Second_Screen_LeadPhone
fields.fieldText: Phone: {!VarLeadPhone}

fields.name: First_Screen_AccountSWIndustry_0_0
fields.fieldText: Email: {!VarLeadEmail}

fields.name: First_Screen_AccountAccurate_0_0
fields.fieldText: Lead details accurate?

fields.name: Update_AccountLogo
fields.fieldText: {!Logo}

fields.name: Update_AccountSpaceHeader
fields.fieldText: Please update&verify all Account details:

fields.name: Contacts_Not_AccurateText1
fields.fieldText:
If any details in the contacts are inaccurate please exit this wizard and manually update the contacts.

For any further assistance please contact SalesOps.

fields.name: Update_AccountFooter
fields.fieldText: Clicking the Next button will update the Account record.

fields.name: Update_AccountLogo_0
fields.fieldText: {!Logo}

fields.name: Update_AccountSpaceHeader_0
fields.fieldText: Please update&verify all Account details:

fields.name: Update_AccountFooter_0
fields.fieldText: Clicking the Next button will update the Lead record.

fields.name: Second_Screen_LeadHeader1_1
fields.fieldText:
Lead Details
Please update&verify all Lead details.

fields.name: Warning
fields.fieldText: Clicking the Next button will update the Lead record.

textTemplates.name: EmailTemplate
textTemplates.text:
Hello {!VarOwnerName},


You have received a new MQL from the MIR team. Please see details below:


Company: {!VarAccountName}

Prospect: {!VarProspect}

Use case: {!QuestionaireScreenRelevantUseCase2}

Meeting Date: {!Discovery_Call_Meeting_Date}

Link to SFDC: https://similarweb.my.salesforce.com/{!VarTaskID}


Please review handover information and mark meeting as In Progress.
